offer: For law office administrators processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We simplify the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual reconciliation of client retainer fees is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law office administrators
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to law office administrators with demo video
Engage in community forums for law office administrators
try_it: Let users try user-friendly dashboard for invoice tracking.
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
